meaning: n.粗饲料,粗粮,粗糙的原料
examples: Insoluble fiber, commonly called "roughage", promotes a healthy digestive tract.
Some cats enjoy chomping on plants every once in a while to get roughage or fiber.
The adults pay us no heed and are mostly interested in finding the next piece of roughage.
This roughage is important in prevention of constipation and may be beneficial in preventing colon cancer and diverticulosis, the development of small pouches off the intestine.
